description_long: This object is a sleek, modern laptop with a matte black exterior and striking blue accent lighting along the keyboard, touchpad, and screen edges. The front features a large, dark display with a subtle reflection, surrounded by a thin bezel. The keyboard is backlit with blue illumination, and the touchpad is outlined in the same blue color, giving it a high-tech appearance. The rear of the laptop lid displays a single, circular blue-lit emblem, adding a distinctive visual element. The laptop's overall design is angular and robust, suggesting a device built for performance, possibly for gaming or professional use. No visible ports or stickers are present on the sides or palm rest, and the screen is currently off.
description: A matte black laptop with blue accent lighting, a backlit keyboard, and a circular blue-lit emblem on the lid. The design is modern, angular, and high-tech.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large dark screen, blue-backlit keyboard, and blue-outlined touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, blue keyboard lighting, and blue edge accents; no visible ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black lid with a single circular blue-lit emblem in the center.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the blue keyboard and touchpad outline; no visible ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A single circular blue-lit emblem is visible on the center of the laptop lid; no text or additional branding is present.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with blue backlighting, a function row, and no visible numeric keypad.
